What we do

Publications

Peer-reviewed journal articles are kept in sync automatically from the lab's ORCID record; conference papers, posters, and talks are curated by hand.

Blog posts & plain-language summaries

To be (stable) or not to be Nature Ecology & Evolution Community · 2022 Tap, tap, tap: three is plenty for windy flight K. P. T. Haughn · Springer Nature Communities · 2024

Data & code

We practice open science: the data and code behind our papers are released publicly on publication, so results can be checked, reused, and built upon.

UC-BIRD-Lab on GitHubDatasets on FigShare

Bio-Informed Research & Design Lab

Department of Mechanical & Aerospace Engineering, UC Davis, Davis, CA
